html:
Exclusive to:

“Can be placed on dirt ground to change the type of ground.”

-

Mosaic Flooring is a turf type exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It was added in A Little Drama Update alongside with lush carpet and Ruins turfs. It can be found near the Stage Set Piece or crafted using a single piece of Marble for four turf. It comes in three different colours.

TurfsCraftable Items

Mosaic Flooring is a turf type exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It was added in A Little Drama Update alongside with lush carpet and Ruins turfs. It can be found near the Stage Set Piece or crafted using a single piece of Marble for four turf. It comes in three different colours.

You step on it. |woodie = Just some ground, eh? |maxwell = A stone floor. |wigfrid = A piece of the battlefield. |webber = Some very old stones. |warly = It's like an ingredient for the ground. |wormwood = Not dirt |winona = That's a chunk of ground. |wortox = Floor or ceiling, depending on your perspective. |wurt = Ground bit. |walter = A patch of ground. |wanda = Why am I wasting time staring at the ground? |choose = wilson}} {{Scrapbook Info|Can be placed on dirt ground to change the type of ground.}} '''Mosaic Flooring''' is a [[Turfs|turf]] type exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]''. It was added in ''[[A Little Drama and QOL|A Little Drama]]'' Update alongside with lush carpet and [[Ruins]] turfs. It can be found near the [[Stage]] Set Piece or crafted using a single piece of [[Marble]] for four turf.
